title: ClusterRole and ClusterRoleBinding
description:
## ClusterRole and ClusterRoleBinding

RBAC **ClusterRoles** grant permissions cluster-wide (across all namespaces), unlike Roles which are namespace-scoped.

**Your task:**

1. Create a **ClusterRole** named `pod-reader` that allows `get`, `list`, `watch` on `pods`
2. Create a **ClusterRoleBinding** named `pod-reader-binding` that binds `pod-reader` to the ServiceAccount `default` in the `default` namespace

```bash
kubectl create clusterrole --help
kubectl create clusterrolebinding --help
```

hints.title: Create the ClusterRole
hints.body: Use `kubectl create clusterrole` with `--verb` and `--resource` flags.

hints.title: Create the ClusterRoleBinding
hints.body: Bind the ClusterRole to a ServiceAccount using `--serviceaccount=namespace:name`.
